name: cloudflare-content-platform
description: Ebook and video membership platform API for Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply CONTENT_DB --remote

CONTENT_DB.description: D1 database for users, orders, VIP entitlements, and affiliate ledger.

CONTENT_CACHE.description: KV namespace for cached content catalog and short-lived access tokens.

CONTENT_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket for protected PDF, video, cover, and preview assets.

GITHUB_CATALOG_URL.description: Raw GitHub URL for `catalog.json`, for example `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owner/content-library/main/catalog.json`.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Optional read-only GitHub token if your content catalog repository is private.

CONTENT_SYNC_SECRET.description: Secret used by your backend payment system to sync paid VIP/content entitlements into this Worker.

BEPUSDT_MERCHANT_KEY.description: Optional. Only needed if bepusdt-trc20-listener calls this Worker directly instead of your backend payment system.

ADMIN_API_TOKEN.description: Secret token for backend admin operations such as batch content import and cloud-drive sync.

CLOUD_DRIVE_PROVIDER.description: Optional provider label for cloud drive binding, for example openlist, alist, google-drive, one-drive, r2, or manual.

AI_CUSTOMER_SERVICE_ENDPOINT.description: Optional AI customer service upstream endpoint.

AI_CUSTOMER_SERVICE_TOKEN.description: Optional secret token for the AI customer service upstream endpoint.
